metadata.description: Technical Lua code quality rubric for BAR Rules (formerly Gadgets)

rubrics.description: Must be valid Lua with 'rule:GetInfo()' defined correctly and 'enabled = true' set inside the info table.

All 'Spring.*' functions must be real and used with correct signatures. Standard Recoil/BAR APIs (e.g., AddUnitDamage, GetUnitsInSphere) must not be flagged as invalid if used correctly. Flag hallucinated functions.

UnitIDs must be validated with 'Spring.ValidUnitID' before access. Handles nil values properly and avoids expensive global loops like 'Spring.GetAllUnits' inside high-frequency call-ins (e.g., GameFrame).
All game-changing logic (MoveCtrl, AddUnitDamage, Spawn) must be strictly contained within 'if ruleHandler:IsSyncedCode() then' blocks.
The code must accurately implement the 'Target Logic Description' without missing requested mechanics.
A 'local config' table must be defined. All config variables must be used in the logic, and no 'Magic Numbers' (hardcoded constants) should exist outside the config table.
